name: Derrick Teye
title: Front-End Developer | UI/UX Designer | IT Support Specialist
address: Nii Aku Mensah Ave, Accra, Ghana
summary: Results-driven Front-End Developer, UI/UX Designer, and IT Support Specialist with hands-on experience developing scalable, responsive, and user-focused web applications using React.js, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, REST APIs, Supabase, and PostgreSQL. Proven ability to deploy production-ready applications, integrate payment systems such as Paystack, and leverage AI-assisted development tools including Cursor AI and ChatGPT to improve development efficiency, debugging, and rapid prototyping. Experienced in IT support, school management systems, client onboarding, and audit system development through National Service at Excelz Audit. Passionate about building intuitive digital solutions, improving user experience, and delivering technology-driven business solutions.

Support and maintain school management systems used for administration, reporting, and student data management.
Assist in onboarding and technical setup for multiple clients, improving user adoption and operational efficiency.
Collaborate in the development of an audit management system to streamline workflow automation and reporting processes.
Troubleshoot software, network, and system-related issues to ensure uninterrupted daily operations.
Support deployment, testing, and system documentation activities for internal software solutions.

Integrated PostgreSQL and Supabase databases for authentication, cloud storage, and data management workflows.
